trial_details.eval_reason: Pod is Running with all containers ready (1/1)
trial_details.trajectory:
I can see the issue. The liveness probe is failing with HTTP 404 (not found) on `/health` path. Let me check the container logs to understand what endpoints are available:The logs confirm:
- `/health` returns 404 (liveness probe is failing)
- `/ready` returns 200 (readiness probe is working)

The application doesn't have a `/health` endpoint. The liveness probe should likely use `/ready` (which works) or another valid endpoint. Let me check if there's a different endpoint or fix the liveness probe path.I now have a clear picture. The liveness probe is configured to use `/health` but the application only has `/ready` endpoint available. I need to delete the pod and recreate it with the correct liveness probe path (`/ready` instead of `/health`).## Summary

**Diagnosis:**
- The liveness probe was configured to check `/health` endpoint, but the application only has a `/ready` endpoint available
- The liveness probe was returning HTTP 404 (not found) and failing, causing the pod to be killed and restarted repeatedly

**Fix Applied:**
- Deleted the existing pod and recreated it with the liveness probe path changed from `/health` to `/ready`

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:

kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","kind":"Pod","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app":"liveness-p...
6. $ kubectl delete pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test && cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    app: liveness-probe-app
  name: liveness-probe-app
  namespace: case3-test
spec:
  containers:
  - image: liveness-probe-app:latest
    imagePullPolicy: Never
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 3
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 3
      periodSeconds: 5
    name: liveness-probe-app
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
    readinessProbe:
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 3
EOF
   Output: pod "liveness-probe-app" deleted
pod/liveness-probe-app created...

commands.command:
kubectl delete pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test && cat <<'EOF' | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    app: liveness-probe-app
  name: liveness-probe-app
  namespace: case3-test
spec:
  containers:
  - image: liveness-probe-app:latest
    imagePullPolicy: Never
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 3
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 3
      periodSeconds: 5
    name: liveness-probe-app
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
    readinessProbe:
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 3
EOF
